evals.prompt: What is the health of my relationship with BrandXYZ?
expect: gap-record returned when BrandXYZ is not in pipeline/accounts/

evals.prompt: Check the health of my West Elm account.
expect: overdue_invoices drives red score if present
recommended_action is follow_up or review_contract for red score

evals.prompt: Which of my past brand deals are due for renewal?
expect: renewal-signal scans closed/fulfilled deals in the lookback window
candidates are ranked by exclusivity expiry proximity
zero candidates returns empty list with note, not fabricated candidates
